creator: empty.japan
caption:
I always thought of Nagano as the ultimate winter destination - the sheer number of ski resorts here is unbelievable! As you drive around, you can spot ski runs on almost every hill and mountain. And after a long day on the slopes, there’s nothing better than relaxing in one of the many hot springs.

But it turns out that Nagano is also an incredible summer spot. The cooler mountain air is a refreshing escape during the hot months. If you are into staying active, there are endless hiking trails and a few great spots for mountain biking to explore. Plus, the region is filled with hidden shrines and temples without any crowds.
It is definitely one of the best places to visit in Japan, no matter the time of year.

📍 Yagisawa Station, Ueda
